data.title: CPI m/m
data.bullish_scenario: CPI below forecast → disinflation narrative. Rate cut hopes boost risk assets. BTC bullish.
data.bearish_scenario: CPI above forecast → inflation sticky. Fed stays hawkish. Risk-off, BTC dumps.

data.title: FOMC Economic Projections
data.bullish_scenario: Dovish tone or rate cut → liquidity injection. Risk-on. BTC and equities rally hard.
data.bearish_scenario: Hawkish surprise or rate hike → tightening. Risk-off selloff across crypto and equities.
